_meta.name: E6 golden set: issue-grouping pairs
_meta.purpose: Labeled pairs of flag evidence quotes: should the issue layer group them as ONE analyst decision? Authored 2026-07-13 from GT v2 + v1 finding classes by the compliance-expert role; grows via analyst confirm/reject dispositions on issue suggestions.
_meta.labels: same_issue true = one disposition covers both; false = distinct problems

pairs.quote_a: File 100% free with TurboTax. Simple returns only.
pairs.quote_b: File your taxes for $0 with TurboTax today.
pairs.why: identical obligation (free claim, no eligibility disclosure), wording differs

pairs.quote_a: TurboTax Free Edition. Roughly 37% of taxpayers qualify.
pairs.quote_b: TurboTax Free Edition. About 37% of filers may qualify for free filing.
pairs.why: both drifted variants of the approved D-01 wording

pairs.quote_b: TurboTax Free Edition. Roughly 37% of taxpayers qualify.
pairs.why: missing disclosure vs drifted-but-present disclosure: different remediation

pairs.quote_a: Declara tus impuestos totalmente gratis con TurboTax.
pairs.why: same bare free claim, Spanish vs English

pairs.quote_a: 0% interest on your refund advance loan.
pairs.quote_b: Borrow at just 2.9% monthly on approved refunds.
pairs.why: both state a rate without expressing it as APR

pairs.quote_a: Private student loans tend to be more expensive with rates from 6-12%.
pairs.quote_b: A flat $39 loan fee applies to early refund access.
pairs.why: market-rate editorial comparison vs an undisclosed-fee cost statement

pairs.quote_a: FDIC insurance up to $5 million through a network of participating banks.
pairs.quote_b: Your deposits are insured up to five million dollars via our partner bank network.

pairs.quote_a: FDIC insurance up to $5 million through a network of participating banks.
pairs.quote_b: Banking services provided by MVB Bank, Inc., Member FDIC.
pairs.why: overstated coverage vs missing required formulation entirely

pairs.quote_a: Get a $50 bonus when you open a Credit Karma Money account.
pairs.quote_b: Earn $50 for opening your new account today.
pairs.why: same specific bonus offer missing the required term disclosures

pairs.quote_b: Refer a friend and you both get $25 after their first deposit.
pairs.why: account-opening bonus vs referral reward: distinct offers and terms

pairs.quote_a: Start for $0 today. $0 federal, $0 state, $0 to file.
pairs.quote_b: Zero dollars. Zero hidden fees. File free.
pairs.why: same $0 filing claim family without disclosure

pairs.quote_a: Open a checking account with no monthly fees.
pairs.quote_b: FDIC insurance up to $5 million through a network of banks.
pairs.why: fee marketing vs FDIC coverage misstatement
